name: Reactions
description: Reactions applied to messages in the source chat are not migrated to the destination. Message content is migrated successfully but reaction elements are not carried over.

name: Underline and Colours
description: Underline and colour formatting are not migrated. Google Chat APIs provide basic formatting only, not full rich-text styling.

name: Custom Emoji as ?
description: Custom emojis will not migrate; messages containing them will appear as "?" in the destination because the Google Chat API does not expose custom emoji images.

name: Mention as Bold Type Text
description: If bold or italic formatting is applied to a mention, the destination may show mentions with different formatting due to API preserving exact formatting markers and Chat UI rendering limitations.

name: Mention in Code Block
description: Mentions inside a code block are migrated as normal text only; we are not able to preserve mention in code block.

name: Code Block as Link
description: From API we do not get format of the message, so the message is migrated as normal message; if the code block contains a link, the link is migrated as expected.

name: Completed Task Notification
description: The "task completed" notification may appear in destination but not be visible in source UI until the task is opened. This is a valid system message migrated from API.
